job_name: 智能驾驶数据产品实习生
company_name: 德赛西威
喜利得（上海）有限公司
job_description:
This role will support the Training & Development function in daily operations, project coordination, and system management. The intern will gain hands‑on experience in training operations, performance management support, and global HR project exposure.

Responsibilities:

1. Training Operations Support

Support the organization and coordination of training sessions (scheduling, logistics, communication).
Maintain training attendance records, program lists, and reporting data.
Assist with leadership and talent development workshop arrangements.
Support post‑training follow‑up and participant tracking.

2. Training Content & Program Development

Assist in preparing training materials and documentation.
Support Training Needs Analysis and consolidate departmental learning needs.
Help maintain existing training programs and support new course development.
Coordinate internal trainer activities such as TTT workshops.

3. Training Effectiveness Evaluation

Collect participant feedback and assist with training evaluation.
Help analyze training results and suggest areas for improvement.
Support identifying key knowledge, skills, and behaviors (KSA) required for performance.

4. Training & Development Project Support

Assist with corporate learning program rollout in collaboration with global training teams.
Support GEOS (Global Employee Opinion Survey) execution, data consolidation, and action plan follow‑up.
Provide general support for HR talent development initiatives and projects.

Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in HR, Psychology, Business Administration, or related fields preferred.

Strong communication and coordination skills.

Detail‑oriented with strong organizational skills.

Proficient in MS Office (Excel, PPT).

Passion for learning, HR development, and people‑oriented projects.

Able to commit at least 3–6 months preferred.

company_name: 苹果贸易（上海）有限公司
job_description:
Imagine what you could do here. At Apple, new ideas have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. The people here at Apple don03t just craft products - they build the kind of wonder that revolutionized entire industries. It03s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts. Join Apple, and help us leave the world better than we found it!

Are you interested in being part of a team that continues to innovate the way people and machines interact? The world of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML) is rapidly growing and the human annotation team is a big part of it. Siri is powered by Apple Intelligence and offers a faster, easier way to get things done on your Apple devices, even before you ask. The Data Operations team is passionate about technology with a focus on enriching the customer experience. We are looking for a motivated Annotation Analyst that demonstrates active listening, integrity and acute attention to detail. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish.

Description
Our team is comprised of very talented individuals, who are passionate about AIML and ensuring Apple services are at their best. 

As part of the Data Operations team you'll play a central role in enhancing the user experience. We work in a fast paced, dynamic, technology focused environment. As an Annotation Analyst, you'll annotate data which can be both audio and visual and evaluate data from customers who have opted in to the grading program. You'll use your language and cultural knowledge, along with analytical skills, to evaluate responses and information against guidelines. Your flexibility and the ability to prioritize tasks is essential. We focus on the user experience, thinking creatively on how customers use our products and use this knowledge for improvements.

Because we believe our individual backgrounds, perspectives, and passions help us build the ideas that move all of us forward. We'll train you to be an expert in understanding, supporting and improving the customer experience. 

This position is required to work Monday through Friday with work hours starting from 9am to 6pm local time with scheduling and work flexibility based on business needs.

Minimum Qualifications
- Chinese(Mandarin) reading, writing, and comprehension skills to support the language specific market
- Fluency in English reading, writing and comprehension skills to partner with international teams
- Excellent active listening skills with the ability to understand verbal nuances
- Understanding of the local region and cultural variations
- Demonstrates integrity and focuses on customer privacy

Preferred Qualifications
- Sensitivity to space and color
- Demonstrates attention to detail and critical thinking skills in evaluation of language usage and dialect
- Highly organized with strong attention to detail
- Ability to independently navigate systems and tools
- Experience in content review or a similar environment, prior testing experience preferred
- Demonstrates flexibility and adaptability to changing work-flows and responsibilities
- Grows with a team where expertise is shared and feedback is welcomed
- Excels at working independently to make timely decisions and take appropriate actions
- Experience as an end user of Siri, similar Intelligent Personal Assistants, or other AI
- Successfully meets or exceeds targets, working within tight deadlines
- Ability to identify business process solutions that increase efficiencies
- Ability to maintain focus and aim for high results through large volumes of tasks
- Ability to work on safety data which could include offensive material
- Thrives in repetitive work and ambiguous scenarios
- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent job-related experience

一、岗位职责
核心：聚焦个人账号运营、内容发行及AIGC相关基础操作，助力AI漫剧、短剧细分领域优质账号打造，为后续内容发行奠定基础。
- 核心负责公司提供的账号养号工作，聚焦AI漫剧、短剧细分领域，搭建账号框架、布局内容，打造高权重、高曝光优质账号，为后续短剧、漫剧账号发行铺垫。
- 协助项目负责人完成账号全流程运营，配合完成国内、海外各平台（重点抖音）的内容分发、上架，负责AIGC文生视频制作、抽卡、基础剪辑等相关辅助工作，助力账号权重提升。
- 梳理账号运营、AIGC内容制作、剪辑、发行等相关工作流程，做好全流程标准化记录与归档，确保工作可追溯，配合优化团队工作效率。
- 协助统计账号运营数据（播放量、转化率、粉丝增长等），完成基础数据记录与整理，及时反馈运营过程中的问题，助力运营策略调整。
- 配合项目负责人学习各平台（重点抖音）运营规则、发行要求，掌握基础运营技巧与发行策略，助力内容曝光、流量获取及粉丝增长。
- 完成账号养号、内容制作（AI选题、AI文案策划、AI生图生视频、剪辑等）、图文/视频发布、账号维护等辅助工作，积极配合团队协作，推进细分领域账号搭建。

二、任职要求
- 中专及以上学历，专业不限，接受应届生、无相关工作经验，对账号运营、内容发行、AIGC内容制作有浓厚兴趣者优先。
- 认同账号提前养号、聚焦细分领域的运营模式，具备较强的学习意识、合作精神，愿意跟随项目负责人学习成长（无需签署个人养号签约协议）。
- 具备基础电脑操作能力，需拥有剪辑基础、P图基础，且具备AI制作视频、音频的相关经验，能提供对应作品，主动学习相关操作技巧，配合完成内容发布、数据统计、记录归档等基础工作。
- 工作认真细致、责任心强，具备良好的执行力，可自由安排工作时间，但需保证账号定期更新，严格按照要求完成各项工作任务。
- 学习能力强，态度积极主动，有耐心、肯钻研，能适应项目合作节奏，具备基本的问题反馈意识。
- 具备良好的沟通能力与团队协作精神，细心严谨，能积极配合项目负责人及团队完成各项辅助工作。
- 有TikTok、Meta、YouTube、抖音等平台使用经验，且具备剪辑基础、P图基础，拥有AI制作视频、音频的相关经验并能提供对应作品者优先。

三、职位公示信息
- 【工作平台】：抖音
- 【工作内容】：账号搭建、选题策划、内容制作、提示词优化、图文内容优化、AIGC内容生成、剪辑、内容发布、账号运营、粉丝运营、社群运营、流量获取及目标用户涨粉
- 【工作要求】：可自由安排工作时间，需保证账号经常更新
- 【薪资标准】：实习生前期享有固定底薪，无提成；实习结束前，若业绩达标，可选择在实习结束后转为外部合作发行，转为外部合作发行后，仅享有提成（提成计算标准：账号流量转化为发行收入后，扣除IP改编授权成本、剧本成本、承制成本、算力成本、投流成本、税费等管理成本后，按50%比例提成）；实习期间表现优异者，可获得转正机会。
- 【收费说明】：不收取任何费用
- 【结算方式】：月结

job_name: 机器人数据采集工程师（实习生）
company_name: 上海德迩实业集团有限公司
job_description:
1. 协助工程师完成机器人相关数据的采集工作，包括但不限于机器人运行参数、运动轨迹、传感器数据、环境数据等，严格按照采集规范操作，确保数据的真实性、完整性和准确性。
2. 负责采集设备的日常检查、简单调试与维护，包括数据采集终端、传感器、连接线等，发现设备异常及时上报，协助处理简单故障，保障采集工作正常推进。

3. 协助完成采集数据的初步整理、分类、录入与备份工作，按照规定格式归档数据，配合团队完成数据台账的更新与维护，便于后续数据检索和分析使用。

4. 配合正式工程师开展机器人数据采集方案的辅助执行工作，参与现场采集场景的布置、参数调试等基础操作，记录采集过程中的相关信息和问题。

5. 学习机器人数据采集相关的专业知识和技能，熟悉采集工具、传感器原理及机器人基础结构，快速掌握数据采集流程和操作规范。

6. 协助完成团队交办的其他与数据采集、机器人相关的辅助工作，积极配合团队协作，及时反馈工作进展和遇到的问题，主动沟通学习。

7. 严格遵守公司规章制度和实验室安全规范，规范操作采集设备和机器人，杜绝违规操作导致的设备损坏或数据丢失。
